papers_mined.title: Sky burial / Jhator (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Tibetan jhator ritual; Himalayan + griffon vultures consume body; complete consumption = good karma signal, partial/refusal = bad-life indicator (acceptance criterion via external scavenger judgment).
